title: corydalis flexuosa subsp. balsamiflora
intro: Corydalis flexuosa subsp. balsamiflora, also known as Balsam Corydalis or Chinese Corydalis, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China and Tibet. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as pain relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced stress, making it a popular herb for anxiety and insomnia. Corydalis flexuosa subsp. balsamiflora can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote relaxation and well-being.
